title: Cutover Manifest
description: Declarative input for the orchard's defunct-pinner cutover workflow. Authored 2026-04-27 against the Mibera mainnet incident; designed to parameterize across collections (FRACTURED activations, partner sunsets, micodex-studio exports). Consumed by `staging-recovery`, `serving-metadata`, and `rotating-baseURI` skills.

schema_version.description: Manifest schema version. Bump major on breaking changes.

manifest_id.description: Unique slug for this cutover. Convention: {collection-slug}-{YYYY-MM-DD}. E.g. `mibera-2026-04-27`.

via.description: Skill or workflow that produced this manifest. E.g. `staging-recovery` or operator-authored.

slug.description: URL-safe identifier. Used for route paths (`/api/{slug}/[tokenId]`) and DB table prefix.

chain.description: EVM chain. Used to select RPC endpoint + alchemy network identifier.

rpc_url.description: Override RPC. Default per-chain: ethereum→cloudflare-eth, berachain→rpc.berachain.com, etc.

pattern.description: Contract's URI authority pattern. setBaseURI/setBaseUri = collection-wide prefix (per-token mutation = file/row update, no contract call). setTokenURI = per-token URI (every mutation needs contract call).

authority.description: Access control modifier on the URI mutation function.

owner_address.description: Address with authority to call the URI setter. For onlyOwner contracts, this is the contract owner. For role-based, this is the granted address.

emits_batch_metadata_update.description: Does the URI setter auto-emit EIP-4906 BatchMetadataUpdate? Mibera contract: true. FracturedMibera: false. Affects post-rotation propagation strategy.

source_of_truth.description: Where to read traits + image hashes from. Sovereign sources first; third-party fallbacks last.

type.description: Source backend type. mibera-codex: per-token .md files with YAML frontmatter. supabase-table: Postgres table keyed by tokenid. git-repo: arbitrary repo with structured per-token data. operator-backup: local filesystem. alchemy-cache: NFT API getNFTMetadata. irys-direct: live Irys gateway probe (best-effort, often dead).

path.description: Filesystem path or URL to the canonical source. For mibera-codex: path to repo root. For git-repo: clone URL + path. For supabase-table: connection string.

lookup_pattern.description: Template for resolving per-token source. E.g. `miberas/{tokenId:04d}.md` for mibera-codex. {tokenId} substitutes raw; {tokenId:04d} zero-pads to 4 digits.

hash_index.description: Optional path to JSON mapping tokenId → image hash. For mibera-codex: `_codex/data/mibera-image-urls.json`.

additional_sources.description: Fallback sources in priority order. Tried if primary source fails for a given tokenId.

image_source.description: How to compose the image URL inside metadata JSON. Decoupled from source_of_truth so the trait-data source and image-host can differ.

url_pattern.description: Template with {hash} or {tokenId} substitution. For Mibera: `https://thj-assets.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/reveal_phase1_images/{hash}.png`.

hash_source.description: Where the {hash} value comes from. frontmatter: in the per-token source. hash_index: separate JSON file. compute: hash the image bytes.

rotation_target.description: Where the contract's baseURI should point AFTER rotation, and what's getting replaced.

new_base_uri.description: New baseURI to call setBaseURI with. MUST end with `/` for ERC-721 path concatenation. E.g. `https://www.honeyroad.xyz/api/mibera/`.

old_base_uri.description: Current baseURI. Preserved for rollback. Read on-chain via tokenURI(1) - tokenId substring.

service.description: What kind of endpoint backs the new baseURI. honeyroad-api: Next.js dynamic route. static-cdn: pre-built JSON files served via CDN. ipfs: pinned content.

route_path.description: When service=honeyroad-api: the dynamic route path. E.g. `app/api/mibera/[tokenId]/route.ts`.

persistence.description: Where the canonical metadata is staged for serving. NULL when service=static-cdn or ipfs.

schema_module.description: Drizzle schema module export name. E.g. `miberaMetadata`.

connection.description: Connection string env var name. E.g. `DATABASE_URL`.

acceptance.description: Quality gates. Sprint pauses + surfaces to operator when not met.

fail_threshold.description: Minimum per-token recovery rate to advance to staging. 0.99 = 99%. Below this, sprint pauses.

long_tail_filing.description: When fail_threshold met but not 100%, file unrecoverables as follow-up tickets.

smoke_samples.description: TokenIds to smoke-test pre-flight. Default: [1, max/4, max/2, 3*max/4, max].

p99_latency_ms.description: Maximum p99 latency for the served route. SLA target.

rollback.description: Rollback configuration if post-rotation verification fails.

strategy.description: restore_old_base_uri: cast send setBaseURI back to old_base_uri (may restore broken-but-original state). snapshot: requires a preserved alternative serving endpoint. manual: surface to operator for ad-hoc resolution.

rollback_uri.description: When strategy=snapshot: the alternative URI to rotate to.

scope.description: Optional scope hints for the workflow runner.

in_scope_skills.description: Subset of orchard skills to invoke. Default: all relevant for this manifest's pattern.

out_of_scope.description: Explicit non-goals for this cutover. Documented for transparency.

collection.name: Mibera
collection.description: 10,000 generative dNFTs in a neochibi aesthetic with randomized cosmetics inspired by Rave Cultures.

collection.name: apdao (TBD)
collection.description: Stub manifest for apdao cutover. Content + chain TBD; this manifest validates the schema works for non-mibera collection shape.
